title: ctenitis leonii
intro: Ctenitis leonii, also known as Leon's fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. Ctenitis leonii has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. The herbal preparations of Ctenitis leonii include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various diseases.
